functions.name: attm_svc_create_db
functions.brief_description: Function use to ease service database creation. Use @see attmdb_add_service function of attmdb module to create service database, then use @see attmdb_add_attribute function of attmdb module to create attributes according to database description array given in parameter.

functions.name: attm_svc_create_db_128
functions.brief_description: Function use to ease service database creation. Use @see attmdb_add_service function of attmdb module to create service database, then use @see attmdb_add_attribute function of attmdb module to create attributes according to database description array given in parameter.

functions.name: attm_reserve_handle_range
functions.brief_description: Function use to verify if several services can be allocated on a contiguous handle range. If this command succeed, it means that service allocation will succeed.  If start_hdl = 0, it return handle using first available handle (start_hdl is modified); else it verifies if start handle given can be used to allocates handle range.

functions.name: attm_att_set_value
functions.brief_description: Update attribute value  Updating attribute value do not trigger any notification or indication, this shall be handled by GATT task.

functions.name: attm_get_value
attm_att_set_perm
attm_att_update_perm
functions.brief_description: Reset some permissions bit in the Handle passed as parameter.

functions.name: attm_svc_set_perm
attm_svc_get_perm
attmdb_svc_visibility_set
functions.brief_description: Control visibility of a service from peer device. service present in database but cannot be access by a peer device.

functions.name: attmdb_destroy
functions.brief_description: Clear database  For debug purpose only, this function clear the database and unalloc all services within database.  This function shall be used only for qualification and tests in order to manually change database without modifying software. *************************************************************************************** /

functions.name: attm_uuid_comp
attm_uuid16_comp
functions.brief_description: Check if two UUIDs matches (2nd UUID is a 16 bits UUID with LSB First)

functions.name: attm_convert_to128
functions.brief_description: Convert UUID value to 128 bit UUID

functions.name: attm_is_bt16_uuid
functions.brief_description: Check if it's a Bluetooth 16-bits UUID for 128-bit input

functions.name: attm_is_bt32_uuid
functions.brief_description: Check if it's a Bluetooth 32 bits UUID for 128-bit input
